description: Vantage is a cloud cost visibility and optimization platform for engineering, finance, and FinOps teams. It aggregates and analyzes spend across cloud, Kubernetes, SaaS, and AI providers, and offers reporting, forecasting, alerts, and AI-assisted workflows.
summary: Vantage exposes a bearer-token REST API at `https://api.vantage.sh/v2`, a remote OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.vantage.sh/mcp`, and a public docs MCP server at `https://docs.vantage.sh/mcp`.
